AudioHardwareSystem  tap(forUID:) Instance Methodtap(forUID:)macOS 15.0+func tap(forUID UID: String) throws -> AudioHardwareTap? Parameters UIDThe String UID of the tap object to obtain.

The AudioHardwareTap that corresponds with the given UID, or nil if the UID does not correspond with any tap object.
